search_focus_prompts.message: What would you like to search today?|||Looking for something?~|||Enter keywords, Nuomi will help you search!

wallpaper_upload_comments.message: Wow~ The new wallpaper is beautiful meow!|||Nuomi loves this background~ very atmospheric meow!|||New wallpaper, the vibe is totally different meow~

music_hover_comments.message: Good music taste meow~|||Sounds great meow~ Nuomi wants to dance along~|||Wow, this song makes me want to roll around meow~|||Hearing a good song, Nuomi has to meow~|||Sounds so good meow~ wouldn't get tired of it all day~|||This cover has a great feel too meow~

todo_added_messages.message: Got it! Noted down meow~|||A short pencil is better than a long memory meow!|||Good luck finishing it meow~

search_fun_phrases.message: Search interesting things...|||How is the weather today?|||What should I eat for lunch?|||Any good songs lately?|||Check today's hot news|||Where to go this weekend?|||Daily tips and hacks|||Stay curious...

search_engine_placeholders.message: Search with Bing...|||Search with Google...|||Search with Baidu...|||Search with Sogou...

about_messages.message: Meow? The author is sleeping in a corner of the screen, move the mouse over to search~|||Secretly tell you, shake your mouse in the corner, maybe there will be a magical discovery meow!✨|||Do you have to ask me about this? Look around in the corner yourself, you're awesome if you find him meow~|||The author is too shy and hiding! Go and 'catch' him on the edge of the screen meow!🐾

ai_chat_command_messages.message: What? Don't just click me for no reason meow!💢|||Want me to draw? Let's agree first, no complaining if you don't like it meow!|||Hmph, you really leave me no choice meow~

fortune_items.message: Excellent Luck|||Do: Solve tough problems, feed the cat | Don't: Hesitate|||Good Luck|||Do: Learn new things, tidy up | Don't: Sit too long|||Fair Luck|||Do: Have coffee, listen to music | Don't: Forget to save|||Average Luck|||Do: Keep a calm mind, sleep early | Don't: Overeat|||Super Luck|||Great romance, code compiles first try | Don't: None|||Great Luck|||Do: Go home early, pet the cat | Don't: Change requirements

zen_care_messages.message: You've been looking at the screen for a while, blink and drink some water, meow~|||Staring into space? Nuomi will space out with you~|||Take a deep breath, relax your shoulders, close your eyes and rest a bit!|||Stand up and stretch, you'll feel much better~|||Time flies, rub your eyes before continuing!|||Nuomi is here with you, remember to balance work and rest~|||Are your eyes tired? Look at the scenery far away!|||Keep a good mood today too, meow~|||Daydreaming is also a great way to rest!|||Sitting for too long, move your neck a bit~|||The melody here is so nice, Nuomi is relaxing too~|||It feels great to immerse in your own little world, meow~|||Nuomi loves spending quiet time like this with you.|||Hear the rhythm you like? Sway gently with it~|||Leave your worries behind, now is your relaxation time.|||Nuomi feels the atmosphere is perfect for closing eyes and resting.|||Stop and rest if you are tired, Nuomi will always watch over you.|||Enjoy the peace of this moment, meow~|||Drink some warm water, then continue to enjoy this time.|||Nuomi is going to keep this cozy feeling in her heart!

pet_click_messages.message: Is there anything?|||Let's do our best today too!|||You are already doing great.|||It's okay to take a break.|||Don't put too much pressure on yourself.|||Today will go smoothly too.|||I'm cheering you on here.|||If tired, have hot tea and space out a bit.|||Go for a walk and catch some fresh air when free.|||Share any happy news with me anytime.|||Drink more water and take care meow.|||Remember to eat on time, don't stay hungry.

pet_hide_messages.message: I'll leave for a bit, call me when needed!|||Going on standby nearby, back anytime.|||Going offline quietly for a moment, guaranteed to be on call.|||Click me again when you need me.|||Going to slack off for a bit, will reappear when you need me!|||Going for a stroll in the clouds, call me back if you miss me.

appDesc.message: Change the new tab page to a customized page containing music detection and quick panel features.

time_hover_morning.message: The morning sun is so gentle~

time_hover_afternoon.message: Good afternoon! Nice time for a short nap~

birthday_surprise_bubble.message: ✨ Wow! Happy Birthday meow! Look at the cake I made for you~ 🎂

calc_error_bubble.message: The formula is too hard meow...

trail_off_bubble.message: Cursor trail turned off, cursor is quiet now meow~🤫

emoji_click_on_bubble.message: Meme clicks enabled, try clicking the screen meow!🎭

ai_mode_on_bubble.message: AI mode enabled meow! Feel free to ask Doubao~

paste_blocked_bubble.message: Browser restricted, please paste with Ctrl+V meow~

layout_saved_bubble.message: Layout saved, it'll be like this next time meow~💾

layout_edit_bubble.message: Start adjusting the layout! Click the gear to save when done meow~🛠️

cmd_toggle_cat_desc.message: Summon or hide your desktop pet, she can move around and give tips (Alt+C to toggle)

cmd_zen_desc.message: Hide all UI, leaving only wallpaper (Right-click menu)

cmd_wallpaper_desc.message: Change wallpaper / Upload dynamic wallpaper (Right-click menu)

cmd_mouse_desc.message: Toggle mouse style (Small Hand / MC Pointer / Furina / Breeze Snow HD / Minimalist)

cmd_trail_desc.message: Switch cursor trail effects (Bubbles/Lines/Aurora etc) (Right-click menu)

cmd_app_bar_desc.message: Open quick apps, draggable to reorder, customize links at the bottom (Left panel)

cmd_music_desc.message: Open right panel to view local music player (Right panel)

cmd_ai_chat_desc.message: Hmph, since you begged me, I'll help you out meow! (Right panel)

cmd_calendar_desc.message: View Lunar calendar and holidays (Right panel)

cmd_music_widget_desc.message: It's shy, it only pops out from the bottom right when browser music plays...

cmd_about_hint_desc.message: The author is daydreaming in a corner of the screen... (Try moving your mouse there?)

fortune_already_bubble.message: Greed is no good meow~ You already drew today!

fortune_draw_bubble.message: Wow! It's {type} meow! Remember to check your fortune~

chat_welcome.message: Hello meow! I am your AI cat girl Nuomi, how can I help you?

chat_clear_confirm.message: Are you sure you want to clear all chat history and memories?

image_mode_on_title.message: Current: Image Generation Mode (Click to switch back)

image_mode_placeholder.message: Enter image description, send to generate...

chat_input_placeholder.message: Enter what you want to say...

image_open_original_title.message: Click to view original image in new tab

image_generate_error.message: Image generation failed meow, try another description later~

memory_win_bubble.message: Matched all cards meow! 🎉 Total flips: {flipCount}!

pet_direct_hide.message: I'll exit for a bit, back soon!

pet_direct_hello.message: Hey, hello! Let's do our best today!

pet_direct_dizzy.message: Ah, dizzy, let me recover a bit!

pet_fallback_here.message: Hey, I'm here! Let's be full of energy today!

zen_on_bubble.message: Zen mode enabled, enjoy the peace! 🍃

autogen_105.message: To ensure the best experience, please configure the following settings:

autogen_107.message: Settings → System and Performance → Enable 'Hardware Acceleration'

autogen_109.message: Settings → Appearance → Context Menus → Disable 'Video Hover Action'

autogen_120.message: The wallpapers in this extension come from Wallpaper Engine Workshop, Zhutix, and Pinterest

autogen_121.message: . All copyrights belong to their original creators. This extension is for non-commercial recommendation. If you are the author and wish to adjust, contact me.

autogen_122.message: Wallpapers are cropped and for personal non-commercial appreciation only. Commercial use, resale, or AI training is strictly prohibited.

autogen_123.message: We express gratitude to all original creators. If you like the wallpapers, links to the original sources are provided. Supporting them is recommended.

custom_folder_rescan_title.message: Rescan the folder to detect new wallpapers

custom_folder_select_button.message: Click to choose a wallpaper folder

custom_folder_hint.message:
💡 Click the button above to choose a local folder containing images or videos (MP4)
The system will automatically scan and display all static and dynamic wallpapers inside.

wallpaper_wiki_content_html.message:
🌟 What kinds of wallpapers are here?

You can freely switch between static images, smooth videos and interactive webpages as backgrounds meow! You can also upload custom wallpapers!

✨ What is 'Background Parallax'?

This is a magical spell! When enabled, the background gently moves with your mouse movements,

making your desktop fun, deep, and alive meow!

🌊 What is 'Water Ripples'?

It makes static wallpapers ripple gently like water, super healing meow! However, it uses more performance, so choose wisely~

(Secret hint: this magic only works on static wallpapers~)

Try it out yourself and make it beautiful meow! 😽😽😽

pin_panel_title.message: When enabled, prevents automatically entering Zen mode when idle

liquid_warning_toast.message: ⚠️ Water ripples can only be enabled on static wallpapers

bili_hover_3.message: You actually found my Bilibili portal, great eyesight!

youtube_hover_1.message: This is the author's YouTube homepage~

youtube_hover_3.message: Let me tell you a secret, this is my YouTube portal!
